meanings.definition: a game played on ice in which heavy stones with handles are slid toward a target
form a curl, curve, or kink
examples: the cigar smoke curled up at the ceiling

meanings.definition: shape one's body into a curl
examples: She curled farther down under the covers

meanings.definition: wind around something in coils or loops
twist or roll into coils or ringlets
play the Scottish game of curling
